subject: Re: Re : Finishes
body:
We are all waiting for you sketch of the pool surrund,, you said you thought you wanted some door surrounds,  HELP,, ALso will I see some of PALm BEach this week


----- Original Message ----
From: "jpm6929@aol.com" <jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Sunday, July 15, 2007 5:53:43 AM
Subject: Re : Finishes


Sometimes I wonder if J.A. knows that Little Saint James is an Island, or that belongs to the U.S.A., it is scary. I am wrong or for more than a year we talk about the Library building? I don,t understand. I think as soon as I am back I want to meet with the "team" in my office in N.Y. and find out if we are all working for the same project... J.P.





-----E-mail d'origine-----
De : J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
A : jpm6929@aol.com
Envoyé le : Samedi 14 Juil 2007 22:22
Sujet : Re: Finishes


thanks,.AMerlling told me today that the czm said a Library is not an approve building for the site,, and that he didn't know that the indoor pool was not being nuilt


----- Original Message ----
From: "jpm6929@aol.com" <jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Saturday, July 14, 2007 3:07:53 PM
Subject: Finishes

Hi Jeffrey, I hope you are doing well.
I went this morning to work with the finishers for a sample of the wood in the main Library, after some changes I got a couple that are really great. I am hoping to take them to the Island, although everyone has reminded me that this is INTERIOR, and the Library will be very much protected of the direct exposure to light. Unfortunally I didn't pay attention of the 14th of July, and I have been caught in traffic for almost 6 hours, it is insane, I am just starting my weekend at 10 P.M. I will give you a call tomorow when I get back to Paris.J.P.
